title: salvia clementiae
intro: Salvia clementiae, also known as the Clementine Sage, is a species of flowering plant in the sage family, Salvia. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Guatemala and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The leaves of Salvia clementiae contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat fever, colds, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Salvia clementiae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are said to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system.
